content_fingerprint: together ai expands serverless model roster with new budget and enterprise tiers together ai has updated its public pricing page adding several frontier and open weight models including deepseek v4 pro qwen3 5 397b a17b and glm 5 1 to its serverless inference offering signaling continued competition for low cost high capability inference workloads for developers and engineering teams evaluating inference vendors the updated roster offers a wider surface area for price performance benchmarking the lfm2 24b a2b model at 0 03 per million input tokens stands out as notably aggressive on input cost
